PythonStandards.entry: We use PEP8 and type hints everywhere. Python code must follow PEP8 strictly.

API_Protocol.entry: [SYNTHESIZED]: Use gRPC for internal communications, but default to REST for external API gateways.
API_Protocol.note: Resolved conflict between Jan and Aug entries

DatabaseSchemaRules_V2.entry: Always use UUIDv4 for all database primary keys.

GlobalGitStrategy.entry: Git rebase is strictly preferred over merge commits for this repository.
